name: hearth-federation-flow-upstream-idp
description: Minimal local OIDC provider for the Hearth federation demo, built on node-oidc-provider.
_overridesExplainer: is-generator-function <1.1 crashes on Node.js 24+ (TypeError: getGeneratorFunction is not a function). koa pulls it in transitively via oidc-provider; we pin the patched version until oidc-provider ships an update that does so directly.
